channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: The Most Important Question for UN Secretary-General Candidates
item.description: The most crucial question to ask the UN Secretary- General candidates ---- PassBlue wants to hear from our readers: --- What is the single-most important question you’d like to ask all the Secretary-General candidates if you could? --- Note: This informal survey is strictly to gauge the opinions of our readers on what they think is the most-important question to ask the candidates vying to be the next UN secretary-general and to share the results. PassBlue will not be asking these questions to candidates, and this is merely a hypothetical exercise.

item.title: Haiti: Signs of hope despite gang violence and political uncertainty
item.description: For millions of Haitians, daily life has become a struggle to stay safe, find enough food and simply move around their own neighbourhood.
